findings.description: PascalCase class names ConnectionFactory and TransactionFactory appear in the source as referenced implementation classes (via connectionFactory/transactionFactory properties) but are absent from hints. Per V4 rules, PascalCase class names from content should be included.
findings.source_evidence: connectionFactory プロパティに ConnectionFactory 実装クラスを設定する / transactionFactory プロパティに TransactionFactory 実装クラスを設定する

findings.description: PascalCase class name StatementFactory appears in the source method signature Dialect#convertCountSql(String, Object, StatementFactory) and in the Java code example, but is absent from hints.
